ucs.title: [LLM] Conti / Wizard Spider pre-encryption choreography (vssadmin + bcdedit + wbadmin + Veeam/SQL service stops within 10m)
ucs.description: Detects the canonical Conti / FIN12 / Wizard Spider pre-ransomware staging sequence on a single host: shadow-copy deletion, boot-recovery sabotage, backup catalog wipe, and termination of the specific backup/database services (Veeam, SQL, Acronis, Sophos, MSExchange) named verbatim in the leaked Conti playbook and the JabberLeaks chats. Two or more of these destructive primitives within a 10-minute window on the same host is virtually never benign and precedes Conti's `*.CONTI` / `*.LOCKED` encryption pass.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_name) as binaries from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*ignoreallfailures*" OR Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND (Processes.process="*delete*catalog*" OR Processes.process="*delete*backup*" OR Processes.process="*delete*systemstatebackup*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe") AND Processes.process="*stop*" AND (Processes.process="*Veeam*" OR Processes.process="*SQL*" OR Processes.process="*Acronis*" OR Processes.process="*Backup*" OR Processes.process="*MSExchange*" OR Processes.process="*Sophos*" OR Processes.process="*MemTas*" OR Processes.process="*BackupExec*")) OR (Processes.process_name="taskkill.exe" AND (Processes.process="*/im*sql*" OR Processes.process="*/im*veeam*" OR Processes.process="*/im*backup*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=10m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval sig=case(match(cmdlines,"(?i)vssadmin.*delete.*shadows"),"VssShadowDelete", match(cmdlines,"(?i)wmic.*shadowcopy.*delete"),"WmicShadowDelete", match(cmdlines,"(?i)bcdedit.*(ignoreallfailures|recoveryenabled|bootstatuspolicy)"),"BcdeditRecoveryKill", match(cmdlines,"(?i)wbadmin.*delete"),"WbadminDelete", match(cmdlines,"(?i)(net1?|sc)\.exe.*stop.*(Veeam|SQL|Acronis|Backup|MSExchange|Sophos)"),"BackupServiceStop", match(cmdlines,"(?i)taskkill.*/im"),"BackupProcKill") | stats values(sig) as Signals dc(sig) as DistinctSignals values(cmdlines) as CmdLines min(firstTime) as FirstAction max(lastTime) as LastAction by dest user | where DistinctSignals>=2 | convert ctime(FirstAction) ctime(LastAction)
ucs.kql:
let lookback = 7d;
let window = 10m;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| extend ContiSignal = case(
    FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadows", "VssShadowDelete",
    FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete", "WmicShadowDelete",
    FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("ignoreallfailures","recoveryenabled","bootstatuspolicy"), "BcdeditRecoveryKill",
    FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("delete catalog","delete backup","delete systemstatebackup"), "WbadminDelete",
    FileName in~ ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has "stop" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Veeam","SQL","Acronis","Backup","MSExchange","Sophos","MemTas","BackupExec","VeeamTransport"), "BackupServiceStop",
    FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-CimInstance Win32_ShadowCopy"), "PsShadowDelete",
    FileName =~ "taskkill.exe" and ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)/im\s+(sql|veeam|backup|acronis)", "BackupProcKill",
    "")
| where isnotempty(ContiSignal)
| summarize SignalTypes = make_set(ContiSignal),
            DistinctSignals = dcount(ContiSignal),
            FirstAction = min(Timestamp),
            LastAction = max(Timestamp),
            Cmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
            Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, window)
| where DistinctSignals >= 2     // 2+ destructive primitives in 10m == Conti playbook
| order by FirstAction desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let window = 10m;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend Sig = case(
    NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "shadows", "VssShadowDelete",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe" and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete", "WmicShadowDelete",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe" and (CommandLine has "ignoreallfailures" or CommandLine has "recoveryenabled" or CommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy"), "BcdeditRecoveryKill",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\wbadmin.exe" and (CommandLine has "delete catalog" or CommandLine has "delete backup" or CommandLine has "delete systemstatebackup"), "WbadminDelete",
    (NewProcessName endswith "\\net.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "\\net1.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "\\sc.exe") and CommandLine has "stop" and (CommandLine has "Veeam" or CommandLine has "SQL" or CommandLine has "Acronis" or CommandLine has "Backup" or CommandLine has "MSExchange" or CommandLine has "Sophos" or CommandLine has "MemTas"), "BackupServiceStop",
    (NewProcessName endswith "\\powershell.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "\\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine has "Win32_Shadowcopy" or CommandLine has "Win32_ShadowCopy"), "PsShadowDelete",
    NewProcessName endswith "\\taskkill.exe" and CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)/im\s+(sql|veeam|backup|acronis)", "BackupProcKill",
    "")
| where isnotempty(Sig)
| summarize SignalTypes = make_set(Sig), DistinctSignals = dcount(Sig),
            FirstAction = min(TimeGenerated), LastAction = max(TimeGenerated),
            Cmds = make_set(CommandLine, 25)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, window)
| where DistinctSignals >= 2
| order by FirstAction desc
ucs.rationale: The leaked Conti operations playbook (Aug-2021) and the JabberLeaks chats explicitly enumerate this exact sequence and the exact service-name list: vssadmin/wmic shadow delete, bcdedit recovery sabotage, wbadmin catalog wipe, then `net stop` against Veeam/SQL/Acronis/Sophos/MSExchange/MemTas. UNC1878 / FIN12 / Grim Spider IR reports (Mandiant M-Trends, Sophos, DFIR Report) repeatedly show 2+ of th

ucs.title: [LLM] Wizard Spider BazarLoader → rundll32 Cobalt Strike beacon load from user-writable directory
ucs.description: Catches the signature TrickBot/BazarLoader/IcedID hand-off to a Cobalt Strike beacon DLL that Conti operators almost universally use for second-stage execution: rundll32.exe loading a .dll from %APPDATA%, %ProgramData%, %Public% or %Temp% with an exported entrypoint (`#1`, `StartW`, `DllRegisterServer`, `PluginInit`). The combination of LOLBin + user-writable path + ordinal/named export is the post-phishing staging fingerprint TrickBot Group has reused since 2020.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name="rundll32.exe" Processes.user!="*$" AND (Processes.process IN ("*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*","*\\Windows\\Temp\\*","*\\Users\\Public\\*")) AND (Processes.process IN ("*.dll,#1*","*.dll,#2*","*.dll, StartW*","*.dll,StartW*","*.dll,DllRegisterServer*","*.dll,DllMain*","*.dll,PluginInit*","*.dll,Update*","*.dll,Control_RunDLL*")) by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where NOT match(parent_process_name,"(?i)^(explorer\.exe|msiexec\.exe|wmiprvse\.exe|searchprotocolhost\.exe|setup\.exe)$") | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName =~ "rundll32.exe"
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
// Conti's BazarLoader / IcedID handoff: rundll32 against a DLL in user-writable territory
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)[""]?[A-Za-z]:\\(Users\\[^\\]+\\AppData\\(Roaming|Local)|ProgramData|Windows\\Temp|Users\\Public)\\[^""]+\.dll[""]?\s*,"
// ...with an ordinal or known-bad exported entrypoint (CS shellcode loaders / Bazar plugin shape)
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\.dll[""]?\s*,\s*(#?\d+|StartW|DllRegisterServer|DllMain|PluginInit|Update|Control_RunDLL)\b"
// Strip benign callers — Defender prints, Office reg-fixers, etc.
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("explorer.exe","msiexec.exe","wmiprvse.exe","searchprotocolhost.exe","setup.exe","runonce.exe")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentFolder = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentSHA256 = InitiatingProcessSHA256,
          ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256 = SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where NewProcessName endswith "\\rundll32.exe"
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)[""]?[A-Za-z]:\\(Users\\[^\\]+\\AppData\\(Roaming|Local)|ProgramData|Windows\\Temp|Users\\Public)\\[^""]+\.dll[""]?\s*,"
| where CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\.dll[""]?\s*,\s*(#?\d+|StartW|DllRegisterServer|DllMain|PluginInit|Update|Control_RunDLL)\b"
| where ParentProcessName !endswith "\\explorer.exe"
   and ParentProcessName !endswith "\\msiexec.exe"
   and ParentProcessName !endswith "\\wmiprvse.exe"
   and ParentProcessName !endswith "\\runonce.exe"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Conti / BazarLoader rundll32 from user-writable path with export call
id: 8e2c6d4f-1f6c-4d6c-a8f3-c1c0c3a4bf01
status: experimental
description: Detects Wizard Spider / TrickBot Group / Conti BazarLoader handing off to a Cobalt Strike beacon DLL via rundll32, where the DLL lives in a user-writable path and is loaded via ordinal or a known loader export.
author: detection-eng
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
    - attack.execution
    - attack.defense_evasion
    - attack.t1218.011
    - attack.g0102
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_image:
        Image|endswith: '\rundll32.exe'
    selection_path:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - '\AppData\Roaming\'
            - '\AppData\Local\Temp\'
            - '\ProgramData\'
            - '\Windows\Temp\'
            - '\Users\Public\'
    selection_export:
        CommandLine|re: '(?i)\.dll["]?\s*,\s*(#?\d+|StartW|DllRegisterServer|DllMain|PluginInit|Update|Control_RunDLL)\b'
    filter_user:
        User|endswith: '$'
    filter_parent:
        ParentImage|endswith:
            - '\explorer.exe'
            - '\msiexec.exe'
            - '\wmiprvse.exe'
            - '\runonce.exe'
    condition: selection_image and selection_path and selection_export and not filter_user and not filter_parent
falsepositives:
    - Niche line-of-business installers that drop a DLL into ProgramData and call it via rundll32 — baseline before deploying.
level: high
ucs.rationale: Wizard Spider / TrickBot Group (CrowdStrike) / GOLD ULRICK (SecureWorks) / UNC1878 (Mandiant) public IR write-ups (DFIR Report 2020-2022, Cybereason 'Memento' report, Sophos Conti report) all show the same hand-off shape: a phishing-delivered BazarLoader / IcedID loader spawns rundll32 against a beacon DLL in %APPDATA% or %ProgramData% and calls it via ordinal `#1` or one of a small set of named e
